TypeSignature.Value: .class public interface auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit ISpanDataProtector implements class Microsoft.AspNetCore.DataProtection.IDataProtectionProvider, class Microsoft.AspNetCore.DataProtection.IDataProtector
type ISpanDataProtector = interface interface IDataProtector interface IDataProtectionProvider

Docs.summary: An interface that can provide data protection services. Is an optimized version of .

MemberSignature.Value: public void Protect<TWriter> (ReadOnlySpan<byte> plaintext, ref TWriter destination) where TWriter : System.Buffers.IBufferWriter<byte>, allows ref struct;

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance void Protect<(class System.Buffers.IBufferWriter`1<unsigned int8>) TWriter>(valuetype System.ReadOnlySpan`1<unsigned int8> plaintext, !!TWriter& destination) cil managed
Public Sub Protect(Of TWriter As IBufferWriter(Of Byte)) (plaintext As ReadOnlySpan(Of Byte), ByRef destination As TWriter)
abstract member Protect : ReadOnlySpan<byte> * 'Writer -> unit (requires 'Writer :> System.Buffers.IBufferWriter<byte>)

Docs.typeparam: The type of buffer writer to write the protected data to.
Docs.param: The buffer writer to which the protected data will be written.
Docs.summary: Cryptographically protects a piece of plaintext data and writes the result to a buffer writer.
Docs.remarks: This method provides an optimized, streaming alternative to . Rather than allocating an intermediate buffer, the protected data is written directly to the provided buffer writer, which can improve performance and reduce memory allocation pressure. The buffer writer is advanced by the total number of bytes written to it.

MemberSignature.Value: public void Unprotect<TWriter> (ReadOnlySpan<byte> protectedData, ref TWriter destination) where TWriter : System.Buffers.IBufferWriter<byte>, allows ref struct;

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance void Unprotect<(class System.Buffers.IBufferWriter`1<unsigned int8>) TWriter>(valuetype System.ReadOnlySpan`1<unsigned int8> protectedData, !!TWriter& destination) cil managed
Public Sub Unprotect(Of TWriter As IBufferWriter(Of Byte)) (protectedData As ReadOnlySpan(Of Byte), ByRef destination As TWriter)
abstract member Unprotect : ReadOnlySpan<byte> * 'Writer -> unit (requires 'Writer :> System.Buffers.IBufferWriter<byte>)

Docs.typeparam: The type of buffer writer to write the unprotected data to.
Docs.param: The buffer writer to which the unprotected plaintext will be written.
Docs.summary: Cryptographically unprotects a piece of protected data and writes the result to a buffer writer.
Docs.remarks: This method provides an optimized, streaming alternative to . Rather than allocating an intermediate buffer, the unprotected plaintext is written directly to the provided buffer writer, which can improve performance and reduce memory allocation pressure. The buffer writer is advanced by the total number of bytes written to it.
